name: Roast Duckling Milan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. With a sharp knife, score the skin of the duckling quarters.
3. Place the duckling quarters, skin side up, on a rack in an uncovered roasting pan.
4. Sprinkle with pepper, oregano, and basil.
5. Roast for 1 hour.
6. Remove the duckling from the rack.
7. Drain liquid from the pan.
8. Place the duckling quarters in the pan without the rack.
9. Spread mustard over the top of the duckling quarters and sprinkle with cheese.
10. Pour vermouth into the pan and continue baking at 400°F for 45 minutes or until tender.
11. Garnish with parsley.
